question: What is the refund policy?
ground_truth: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of the approved request.
context: Our refund policy allows customers to request a refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of the approved request.

question: How do I reset my password?
ground_truth: Click Forgot password on the login page and follow the email instructions.
context: To reset your password, click the Forgot password link on the login page. You will receive an email with instructions to create a new password.

question: What are the data retention policies?
ground_truth: Data is retained for 7 years per compliance requirements.
context: Per our compliance requirements, customer data is retained for a minimum of 7 years. After this period, data is securely deleted.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
ground_truth: We accept Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal.
context: We accept the following payment methods: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal. All transactions are processed securely.

question: How do I contact support?
ground_truth: Support is available 24/7 via live chat and email at support@example.com.
context: Our support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. You can reach us via live chat on our website or by emailing support@example.com.
